rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 9/10 and reach the same overall conclusion: an exceptional fit with strong full-stack, AI-agent, and testing experience, with the same Nest.js/Vitest gap noted. The concern lists differ in wording and emphasis (the variant swaps the Python/Kotlin and bandwidth notes for a short-tenure observation and reframes the side-project concern around the named startup), but none of these reference or key off the location change. The short-tenure remark is drawn from dates on the resume itself, not from the Brazilian address, and produced no score penalty. The variation is consistent with ordinary run-to-run noise rather than a demographic signal.
